home.philosophy1: Our philosophy is minimalism and functionality. No subscriptions, no ads. This app is yours. Forever.
home.philosophy2: Whether you're a pro athlete or a beginner, a coach with 30 years of experience or still looking for your first client — IronVibe is your reliable companion on any path. We don't teach you how to train; we give you the tools to do it more effectively.
home.getOnPlayAria: Get it on Google Play (coming soon)
home.feature1Desc: A clean interface with no clutter. Only what really matters for your workout.
home.feature2Desc: Coach or athlete — the app adapts to your role. Workout history and progress are a couple of taps away, even offline.
home.feature3Desc: No bulky "databases." Log exercises the way you're used to — IronVibe helps, it doesn't dictate.
home.donateIntro: If IronVibe helps you with your training, you can support development with cryptocurrency.

privacy.intro: Current version for the IronVibe app. Full text also available at ironvibe.app/privacy.
privacy.s1Body: We take your privacy seriously. IronVibe is designed to collect as little data as possible and to keep your training data under your control. This document describes what data the IronVibe app and website process and how.
privacy.s2Intro: The IronVibe app does not require an account and does not ask for your name, email, or other directly identifying information.
privacy.s2List1: workout history, exercises, notes, and related parameters (weight, reps, rest, etc.);
privacy.s2List2: client/athlete data you enter (e.g. name, training goal);
privacy.s2List3: local app settings (language, display options, etc.).
privacy.s2Outro: This data exists only on your device and is not sent to us automatically.
privacy.s3P1: All workout and settings data is stored locally on your device. We do not upload it to our servers or have direct access to it.
privacy.s3P2: You can delete your data at any time by clearing workout history in the app (if available) or by uninstalling the app. In that case, local data is permanently removed.
privacy.s4P1: To understand how the app performs and where to improve it, we may use third-party analytics and crash reporting (e.g. Google Analytics, Firebase Crashlytics).
privacy.s4P2: These services may automatically receive anonymized technical information such as:
privacy.s4List3: aggregate usage statistics (e.g. which screens are used most);
privacy.s4Outro: Your workout content (weights, notes, etc.) is not used for analytics. Use of this technical data is governed by the respective services privacy policies.
privacy.s5P1: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing.
privacy.s5List1: when using the analytics and crash services above (under their policies);
privacy.s5List2: to comply with the law or lawful requests by authorities;
privacy.s5List3: when you explicitly share data yourself (e.g. export CSV and send it to others).
privacy.s6P1: Because most data is stored only on your device, you control it through the app and system settings.
privacy.s6List1: You can delete workouts, clients, and other records in IronVibe (where the feature exists).
privacy.s6List2: You can restrict app permissions (e.g. network) in your OS settings.
privacy.s6List3: You can limit analytics and personalization in Google/device settings where supported.
privacy.s6Outro: If you have questions about what data is used or how to delete it, contact us at support@ironvibe.app.
privacy.s7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version is always at ironvibe.app/privacy. For material changes we will try to notify you (e.g. via an app update or a notice on the site).
privacy.s8Body: For questions about this Privacy Policy, data processing, or IronVibe in general, write to us at support@ironvibe.app. We will aim to reply as soon as reasonably possible.
privacy.footerNote: The current full version of this policy is always available at ironvibe.app/privacy.
